selected_dialects.reason: Base panel (extrude_rectangle 550x400x8) plus ribs as add_rib features. sketch_extrude_base covers extrude_rectangle and add_rib for prismatic stiffened panels.
Linear pattern of longitudinal and transverse ribs across the panel, requiring translate/pattern operations to place the rib grid.

safety_notes: Ribbed panel is reference geometry only; not structurally validated. No fatigue/life or airworthiness certification implied. Rib spacing ~60mm is approximate — exact integer division of 550mm and 400mm by spacing may require user adjustment.
